Documentation for PULSEv2 protocols, including flash imaging, reliable transport, and historical evolution.


## Files
- **[flash-imaging.md](flash-imaging.md.md)**: Describes the PULSE flash imaging protocol for reliable and fast data writing to external flash.
- **[history.md](history.md.md)**: Describes the evolution and improvements of the Pebble dbgserial console leading to PULSEv2.
- **[pulse2.md](pulse2.md.md)**: Documentation for the PULSEv2 Protocol Suite, detailing its design, protocol stack, and transport layers.
- **[reliable-transport.md](reliable-transport.md.md)**: Describes procedures for PULSEv2 reliable transport using Stop-and-Wait ARQ based on X.25 LAPB.
